ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Email of the user who created the customer account */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name if the customer is a business */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" INTEGER /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer this bill belongs to */,
  "bill_number" INTEGER /* Bill number for identification */,
  "advance" INTEGER /* Advance payment made by the customer */,
  "balance" INTEGER /* Outstanding balance */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total amount of the bill */,
  "dated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the bill generation (in milliseconds) */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the bill has been deleted (0 = active, 1 = deleted) */,
  "updated_on" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the last update (in seconds) */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* Email of the user who added the bill */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the bill */,
  "late_fee" INTEGER /* Late fee applied to the bill */,
  "discount" INTEGER /* Discount applied to the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the bill (e.g., paid, unpaid, partial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill this payment is for */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., processed, pending, failed) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, cashier, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, sales, customer) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Email of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the report file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill this item is part of */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the item (quantity * price) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the item (e.g., kg, units) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill this log entry is for */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* Email of the user who performed the action */,
  "logged_on" TEXT /* Date the action was logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("email"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_logs_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer this log entry is for */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* Email of the user who performed the action */,
  "logged_on" TEXT /* Date the action was logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_logs_logged_by FOREIGN KEY ("logged_by") REFERENCES users ("email")
)
